text:
First, note that time zones as we know them (like US/Mountain) did not exist in 1765.  
But if we use modern IANA timezone definitions for historical dates:  

- Asia/Shanghai = UTC+8 (no DST historically).  
- US/Mountain = UTC-7 (no DST in 1765).  

Time difference = 8 − (-7) = 15 hours.  
9 PM (21:00) Jan 21 in Shanghai → subtract 15 hours for Mountain time:  
21:00 − 15 hours = 6:00 on Jan 21, 1765.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1765-01-21 06:00
